instruction: The small green dot on the wrench icon has slipped out of place. Move it back to its original position. (very subtle — only 3px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/wrench.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21.75 6.75a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-4.884 4.484c-1.076-.091-2.264.071-2.95.904l-7.152 8.684a2.548 2.548 0 1 1-3.586-3.586l8.684-7.152c.833-.686.995-1.874.904-2.95a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 6.336-4.486l-3.276 3.276a3.004 3.004 0 0 0 2.25 2.25l3.276-3.276c.256.565.398 1.192.398 1.852Z"/>
  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.867 19.125h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Z"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#22c55e" cx="13" cy="112" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
